type: DEFER
files: outlines/types/__init__.py
spec: Add a new module-level constant named hash_sha256 in outlines/types/__init__.py, defined as: hash_sha256 = Regex(r"[a-fA-F0-9]{64}"). Place it in a new section, e.g. under a comment '# Hash types', near the other Regex-based type constants (after isbn is fine). No other changes needed — it must exactly match 64 hex characters (case-insensitive), consistent with existing Regex-based types like isbn/email so it gets Term.validate(), __get_pydantic_core_schema__, __get_pydantic_json_schema__, and DSL operations (optional(), at_least(), etc.) for free via the Regex class.
note: hash_sha256 constant
